languages.text: "Именем Золотого трона, я остановлю и тебя, и твой Теребрум — здесь и сейчас!"

traits.locale_text: "Именем Золотого трона, я остановлю и тебя, и твой Теребрум — здесь и сейчас!"

languages.text: "By the Golden Throne, I will stop you and your Terebrum here and now!"
languages.original_text: "Именем Золотого трона, я остановлю и тебя, и твой Теребрум — здесь и сейчас!"

traits.locale_text: "By the Golden Throne, I will stop you and your Terebrum here and now!"
"By the Golden Throne, I will stop you and your Terebrum here and now!"
"By the Golden Throne, I will stop you and your Terebrum here and now!"
"By the Golden Throne, I will stop you and your Terebrum here and now!"
"By the Golden Throne, I will stop you and your Terebrum here and now!"

languages.text: "Beim goldenen Thron, ich werde dich und dein Terebrum hier und jetzt aufhalten!"
languages.original_text: "By the Golden Throne, I will stop you and your Terebrum here and now!"

traits.locale_text: "Beim goldenen Thron, ich werde dich und dein Terebrum hier und jetzt aufhalten!"

languages.text: "Par le trône d'or, je vous arrête, vous et votre Terebrum, ici et maintenant !"
languages.original_text: "By the Golden Throne, I will stop you and your Terebrum here and now!"

traits.locale_text: "Par le trône d'or, je vous arrête, vous et votre Terebrum, ici et maintenant !"

languages.text: "¡Por el Trono Dorado, te detendré a ti y a tu Terebrum aquí y ahora!"
languages.original_text: "By the Golden Throne, I will stop you and your Terebrum here and now!"

traits.locale_text: "¡Por el Trono Dorado, te detendré a ti y a tu Terebrum aquí y ahora!"

languages.text: "Altın Taht adına, seni ve Terebrum'unu burada ve şimdi durduracağım!"
languages.original_text: "By the Golden Throne, I will stop you and your Terebrum here and now!"

traits.locale_text: "Altın Taht adına, seni ve Terebrum'unu burada ve şimdi durduracağım!"
